Kshenika Graha (momentary influence) with the name Gulika.
The word Gulika Kala means time span of Gulika (Ya ma of
Saturn). Similarly the time span ascribed to various planets
is known by different names. Narada samhita clarifies this as
follows:

[The terms such as Gulika Kala, Yemakandaka Kala,
Arthaprahara Kala etc are names ascribed to the 8th Ya ma of
a day, starting from Sunday]
Complete list of these special names for Y ama of various
planets are given below-
Yama of Sun = Kala Span (of time)
Yama of Moon= Paridhi Span (of time)
Yama ofMars = Dhooma Span (of time)
Ya ma of Mercury = Arthaprahara Span (of time)
Yama ofJupiter = Yemakandaka Span (of time)
Yama of Venus= Yamasukra Span (of time)
Y ama of Saturn = Gulika Span (of time)
Note:- Span = span of time (this is a word I am adding to
